title: PCC Delegates Participate in 35th COMEPP National Conference
excerpt: PCC students and faculty represented the institution in the Business Pitch Competition among 40 prestigious schools nationwide.
content: Passi City College demonstrated its academic prowess at the 35th COMEPP National Conference. The delegation engaged in high-level business simulations and competitive pitching, standing toe-to-toe with 40 prestigious institutions. This participation highlights PCC's commitment to exposing students to national standards of entrepreneurship and management excellence.

title: SOICT Dominates CineStep: 'Epektus' Wins Best Short Film
excerpt: The School of Information and Communication Technology swept the awards including Best Cinematography and Best Director.
content: In a historic win for the School of Information and Communication Technology, the short film 'Epektus' bagged the top prize at the CineStep Film Festival. Beyond the Best Short Film award, the team also secured Best Cinematography and Best Director, proving that PCC students are at the forefront of digital storytelling and multimedia production in the region.

title: Game On: Legends Rise in PCC E-Sports Tournament
excerpt: The campus turns into a warzone of talent as College Week 2026 kicks off with a massive Mobile Legends showdown.
content: College Week 2026 reached a fever pitch with the introduction of the Mobile Legends Tournament. Students from all departments gathered to witness a display of strategic brilliance and teamwork. This E-sports event has become a staple of campus life, reflecting the modern competitive spirit of the PCC 'Legends'.

title: Dr. Janice Jennifer Palmares Elected ALCOR VI President
excerpt: Passi City College is set to host ALCOR VI and XVIII Hinampang 2026 this coming April.
content: The election of Dr. Janice Jennifer P. Palmares as ALCOR VI President marks a significant milestone for Passi City College. Under her leadership, the institution is preparing to host the prestigious Hinampang 2026 this April. This hosting duty brings hundreds of delegates to Passi City, showcasing our hospitality and world-class facilities.

title: SOBM Empowers Communities Through Financial Literacy
excerpt: The School of Business Management successfully held an outreach program at Barangay Imbang Grande.
content: The School of Business Management (SOBM) extended its expertise to Barangay Imbang Grande through a Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship Symposium. Faculty and students shared vital skills in budgeting and small business management, fulfilling PCC's mission of community-anchored social responsibility.

title: Dr. Palmares Keynotes PRO6 Internal Security Course Opening
excerpt: PCC President highlights values and ethical leadership for 280 PNP personnel at Camp Delgado.
content: Dr. Janice Jennifer P. Palmares served as the Guest of Honor and Speaker for the opening of the PRO6 Basic Internal Security Operations Course (BISOC). Addressing 280 PNP personnel at Camp Delgado, she emphasized the critical role of ethical leadership and moral integrity in maintaining public safety and national security.
